title: cmp
html:
cmp

File Read

Dump the bytes of the input file that are different from the NUL byte in a tabular format.

cmp /path/to/input-file /dev/zero -b -l
excerpt: cmp File Read Dump the bytes of the input file that are different from the NUL byte in a tabular format. cmp /path/to/input-file /dev/zero -b -l
